summary: Solid front‑of‑house recording captures a decent show highlighted by a deluxe Black Peter and a tight Crazy Fingers jam, with the second set standing out.
review: The tape delivers a good‑to‑excellent front‑of‑house mix – highs are a bit glassy but overall clear – and the performance is respectable.  The first half stays low‑key while the second set cooks, featuring standout jams on Black Peter and Crazy Fingers.  Reviewers note the show isn’t legendary but certainly worth listening to.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show 3‑4 stars, praising the second‑set jams and recording clarity while noting minor tonal flaws; weighted average of show (≈3.8) and recording quality (≈4.2) yields a solid 4‑star rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house mix is generally clear and captures the band well; some reviewers note glassy highs, but overall the recording is considered excellent to good.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Set improves as it progresses – first half low‑key, second half a cooker with strong jams; the second set is highlighted as particularly good.
